description: Two Orzhov-flavored MH3 commons in this wave, both wired to the existing orzhov-syndicate character node. Charitable Levy is the tithe-extraction operational template at rules-text level (noncreature-spell tax + collection counters + Plains-tutor on sacrifice). Indebted Spirit carries Afterlife, the guild's signature Ravnica Allegiance keyword — debt-past-death rendered as a mechanical signature. Neither card carries the Orzhov watermark (both mono-white in MH3), but their iconographic and mechanical registers are unambiguous. Roster extension, 1:N fanout — node grows by two cards from six to eight. Edgelord notes the blueball is professional, not personal.
citations: [Wizards of the Coast: Ravnica Allegiance design article — Mark Rosewater on Afterlife as Orzhov institutional-thesis keyword]
